title: Phase 23 — Authority Sprint: Backlinks Are The Main Blocker
diagnosis: QFINHUB has executed internal SEO well (content, links, indexing requests, sitemaps). But every real calculator ranks at position 70-95. This is a textbook 0-authority pattern. Google will not rank pages from a domain with 0 backlinks, regardless of content quality.

follow_ups_jun13.pitch: Shorter. Value-first. Widget/embed offer. No backlink ask. No anchor request.
follow_ups_jun13.template:
Hi [name],

I reached out last week about a free [calculator type] — no signup, works on any device.

I built an embed version your readers could use directly on your site: [widget URL]

Would this be useful for your readers? I can customize the numbers to match your content.

— Qasem

new_high_reply_prospects.strategy: Target smaller sites with higher reply rates. Large sites (NerdWallet, Bankrate) won't respond to cold outreach.

prospect_types.rationale: Personal blogs with 1k-10k monthly visitors. Higher reply rate.
Independent brokers who maintain blog/resource sections.
Financial Independence/Retire Early bloggers — value calculators.
Substack/convertkit finance writers who link to tools.
Student loan repayment calculators are useful for this audience.

custom_widget_offers.pitch: Custom affordability calculator branded for your site
Side-by-side comparison tool — readers choose their strategy
Show your readers exactly how their money grows over time
Quick tax bracket check — no signup, instant result
Help your readers decide rent vs buy based on REAL numbers

ultra_short_pitches: Free embeddable mortgage calculator for your readers — no signup, 30 second setup.
Your readers want to know 'can I afford this?' Give them the answer in one click.
I built a free debt payoff tool your readers will actually use. Want to see it?
rules: Do NOT send before scheduled due date unless workflow explicitly says due
No backlink ask in first follow-up
